fields.title: Platform Analytics Information Request
fields.summary: User inquired about platform analytics capabilities and requested documentation. Agent explained the AI-powered conversation analytics features and successfully sent documentation to the user's email address. The interaction concluded positively with the user's information needs met.
fields.user_intent: The user wanted to learn about the platform's analytics capabilities and obtain documentation to evaluate the service.
action_items: Send documentation to john@example.com

fields.title: API Authentication Error Resolution
fields.summary: User encountered a 401 authentication error when connecting to the API. Agent guided troubleshooting and discovered the user was using a test API key in production environment. User switched to production key and the issue was resolved successfully.
fields.user_intent: Resolve API connection authentication error to get their application working properly
action_items: Keep production key secure
Never commit API key to version control

fields.title: Duplicate Billing Charges Resolution
fields.summary: User reported being charged twice for Pro subscription ($49.99 each) and mentioned this was the second occurrence in three months. Agent discovered an unprocessed refund from January and processed refunds for both incidents totaling $99.98. Agent escalated to billing team lead, set up duplicate charge prevention, and scheduled account review within 24 hours.
fields.user_intent: User wanted to resolve duplicate billing charges and prevent future occurrences of the same issue.
action_items: Process refund for March duplicate charge ($49.99)
Process refund for January duplicate charge ($49.99)
Billing team lead to review account within 24 hours
Send confirmation email once refunds are processed

fields.title: Subscription Cancellation Request - CSV Export Issue
fields.summary: User wanted to cancel subscription due to missing CSV export feature in reporting, which was causing manual work copying data weekly. Agent offered 50% discount and API workaround solution. User accepted the compromise and decided to stay with the discount and workaround while waiting for the promised CSV feature in two weeks.
fields.user_intent: User wanted to cancel subscription due to frustration with missing CSV export functionality that was impacting their weekly reporting workflow to management.
action_items: Send API guide with step-by-step CSV export workaround to user's email
Apply 50% discount for next 2 billing cycles
Follow up personally when CSV exports launch

fields.title: AI Conversation Analytics Platform Trial Setup
fields.summary: User from a company using Zendesk inquired about analytics for their 15,000 monthly AI agent conversations after seeing the platform at a SaaS conference. They need a solution within two weeks for board presentation, have $200/month budget, and previously evaluated Qualtrics (too expensive) and in-house development (no capacity). Agent offered Pro plan at $49/month, which fits their budget and timeline. Trial was set up for their team lead Mike at acmecorp.com.
fields.user_intent: The user was looking for an affordable AI conversation analytics solution that could be deployed quickly to provide customer insights for board reporting, after finding existing options too expensive or resource-intensive.
action_items: Send trial setup instructions to mike@acmecorp.com today
Check in after first week to review analysis results
fields.next_best_action: Send trial setup instructions to mike@acmecorp.com immediately and schedule follow-up call for one week into trial to review initial results and discuss upgrade path

fields.title: AI Analytics Evaluation for Customer Service
fields.summary: User evaluates AI-powered conversation analytics for their startup's customer service team handling 2,000 weekly conversations. Initially skeptical about ROI and concerned about budget constraints, they compare the solution to Gong and express concerns about AI accuracy. Agent addresses objections by highlighting scale benefits, cost efficiency at $49/month, and offers a free pilot with 100 real conversations. User agrees to pilot after consulting with CTO.
fields.user_intent: The user wants to evaluate whether AI-powered conversation analytics provides sufficient ROI for their startup's customer service operations, given budget constraints and previous disappointing experiences with AI tools.
action_items: Set up free trial for 100 conversations
User to consult with CTO
Start pilot program next week
objections: Not sure AI-powered analytics is worth the investment compared to manual review
Budget constraints as a startup with existing tool costs
Previous bad experiences with AI tools that promised but didn't deliver
fields.next_best_action: Set up the free trial immediately and follow up within 2 days to ensure pilot starts next week as discussed

fields.title: Thesis Anxiety Progress and Sleep Improvement
fields.summary: User reports significant progress since last session, including improved sleep using breathing techniques, reduced anxiety levels from 8/10 to 5/10, and overcoming two-month avoidance of thesis work. User demonstrates cognitive reframing by recognizing catastrophizing patterns and plans to present draft to study group. Session shows clear therapeutic momentum with concrete behavioral changes.
fields.user_intent: The user wanted to share positive progress from the previous week and discuss how improved sleep and coping strategies helped them overcome thesis-related anxiety and avoidance.
action_items: Continue working on thesis
Present draft section to study group
Check in next week on progress
progress_indicators: Slept through the night three times this week using breathing technique
Started working on thesis methodology chapter after two months of avoidance
growth_markers: I realized I was catastrophizing — like, my thesis doesn't have to be perfect to pass
I recognized my own catastrophizing pattern
I guess I've been harder on myself than I need to be

fields.title: Reframing Core Beliefs About Emotional Expression
fields.summary: User presented feeling discouraged and regressive after a conflict with roommate who called them 'too negative.' They had been isolating for days, skipping classes and meals. Through exploration, user recognized a lifelong pattern of internalizing messages that their emotions are problematic. Agent helped reframe this belief and user showed openness to working on challenging the 'I'm too much' narrative. Session ended with a concrete reframing technique and renewed therapeutic engagement.
fields.user_intent: The user was seeking support for feeling stuck and regressive, ultimately needing help to understand and reframe deeply held beliefs about their emotional nature being problematic.
action_items: When noticing the thought 'I'm too much,' pause and ask 'according to whom?'
Continue working on reframing core beliefs about emotional expression
Schedule next session for same time next week
growth_markers: I never thought about it that way. I just always assumed they were right and I was broken
Recognizing the difference between 'I am too much' versus 'my roommate and I had a conflict about communication styles'

fields.title: Duplicate Billing Charges Resolution
fields.summary: User reported being charged twice for Pro subscription ($49.99 each) and mentioned this was the second occurrence in three months. Agent discovered an unprocessed refund from January and processed refunds for both incidents totaling $99.98. Agent escalated to billing team lead and implemented duplicate charge prevention measures.
fields.user_intent: Get refund for duplicate charges and prevent future billing issues
action_items: Process refund for March duplicate charge ($49.99)
Process refund for January duplicate charge ($49.99)
Billing team lead to review account within 24 hours
Send confirmation email once refunds are processed

fields.title: Subscription Cancellation Request with CSV Export Issue
fields.summary: User wanted to cancel subscription due to missing CSV export feature in reporting, which was causing manual work for weekly management reports. Agent offered 50% discount and API workaround solution. User agreed to try the workaround and stay with the discount, expressing appreciation for the helpful approach.
fields.user_intent: User wanted to cancel subscription due to frustration with missing CSV export functionality that was impacting their weekly reporting workflow to management.
action_items: Send step-by-step API guide to user's email
Apply 50% discount for next 2 billing cycles
Follow up when CSV exports launch

fields.title: SaaS Conference Lead - Analytics Platform Trial Setup
fields.summary: User discovered the platform at a SaaS conference and inquired about analytics for their 15,000 monthly AI agent conversations across three channels. They currently use Zendesk but lack conversation analytics. After discussing pricing and timeline needs for a March board presentation, the agent offered a Pro plan trial at $49/month, well within their $200 budget. Trial setup was arranged for team lead Mike at acmecorp.com.
fields.user_intent: The user wanted to find an affordable analytics solution for their AI agent conversations that could be deployed quickly to provide data for an upcoming board presentation.
action_items: Send trial setup instructions to mike@acmecorp.com
Check in after first week of trial usage

fields.title: Product Evaluation for Customer Service Analytics
fields.summary: User evaluated an AI-powered conversation analytics platform for their startup's customer service team. They expressed budget concerns and skepticism about AI accuracy, comparing it to manual review processes and competitor Gong. The agent addressed cost concerns, explained the platform's focus on AI chatbot conversations, and offered a free pilot with 100 conversations. User agreed to discuss with their CTO and likely proceed with the pilot.
fields.user_intent: The user wanted to evaluate whether an AI-powered conversation analytics platform would be worth the investment for their startup's customer service team, considering budget constraints and accuracy concerns.
action_items: Set up free trial for 100 conversations with no credit card required
User will discuss with CTO before proceeding
Pilot program to start next week

fields.title: Therapy Progress Check-in: Anxiety Management Success
fields.summary: User reports significant improvement in managing thesis-related anxiety using breathing techniques learned in previous session. Sleep quality improved from irregular to sleeping through the night three times per week. User overcame two-month avoidance pattern and began working on thesis methodology chapter. Anxiety levels decreased from 8/10 to 5/10, and user demonstrated cognitive reframing skills by recognizing catastrophizing patterns. Session concluded with user setting goal to present draft section to study group.
fields.user_intent: The user wanted to share progress updates from implementing previous therapy recommendations and discuss continued improvement in managing thesis-related anxiety.
action_items: Continue working on thesis methodology chapter
Present draft section to study group
Check in next week on study group presentation progress

fields.title: Therapy Session: Reframing Self-Worth After Conflict
fields.summary: User came to therapy feeling discouraged and withdrawn after a fight with their roommate who called them "too negative." They had been isolating, skipping classes and meals, and struggling with feelings of failure. The therapist helped them recognize a pattern of internalizing others' criticism about their emotional expression, connecting current feelings to childhood messages about being "too sensitive." Session focused on reframing the core belief "I'm too much" and ended with a specific homework assignment to question this thought pattern.
fields.user_intent: The user was seeking help for overwhelming feelings of failure and self-doubt triggered by interpersonal conflict, ultimately needing to address deep-seated beliefs about their emotional validity.
action_items: When noticing the thought 'I'm too much,' pause and ask 'according to whom?'
Schedule same time next week

fields.title: Activación de suscripción premium retrasada
fields.summary: El cliente compró una suscripción premium hace 2 días pero no tenía acceso. El agente identificó un error en la activación automática y habilitó manualmente el acceso premium, que estará activo en 5 minutos.
fields.user_intent: Obtener acceso a la suscripción premium que ya pagó pero que no se activó correctamente

fields.title: Demande de tarification plan entreprise startup
fields.summary: Le client s'informe sur le prix du plan entreprise à 199€/mois. Il trouve le tarif élevé et demande une offre startup. L'agent propose une réduction de 30% pour les startups de moins de 2 ans, ramenant le prix à 139€/mois.
fields.user_intent: Obtenir des informations sur les prix du plan entreprise et explorer des options de réduction pour sa startup
objections: Le prix de 199€/mois est trop élevé
fields.next_best_action: Confirmer l'éligibilité de la startup pour la réduction et envoyer une proposition détaillée à 139€/mois

fields.title: Frustração com metas não cumpridas
fields.summary: O coachee expressa frustração por não ter conseguido completar nenhuma das metas estabelecidas na semana anterior. O principal obstáculo identificado foi a falta de tempo devido a um projeto de trabalho que consumiu toda sua energia. O coach busca entender os impedimentos para o progresso.
fields.user_intent: O coachee buscava expressar sua frustração e explicar por que não conseguiu cumprir as metas estabelecidas.

fields.title: Doppelte Abbuchung Rückerstattung
fields.summary: Der Kunde meldete eine doppelte Abbuchung auf seiner Rechnung vom 15. März. Der Agent identifizierte das Problem schnell und veranlasste eine Rückerstattung, die innerhalb von 3-5 Werktagen erfolgen soll. Das Problem wurde effizient in einem Kontakt gelöst.
fields.user_intent: Der Kunde wollte eine Korrektur der doppelten Abbuchung und sein Geld zurückerhalten.
action_items: Rückerstattung wird innerhalb von 3-5 Werktagen veranlasst
